$comment: Comment Mod overlay — only fields whose base-game descriptions don't match the SchemaLoader ref-detection regex (e.g. sockets, which describe behaviour but never name the target folder). Last-wins over data/schemas/items-schema.json. Sibling fields not listed here keep the base description.

aSocketReqs.description: Per-tile placement requirements for grid-placed items. Each entry refers to entry within loot.json; that loot's conditions must all be satisfied on the corresponding footprint tile for the item to be placeable. Array length = nCols × nRows; rotates with the item (TileUtils.RotateTilesCW). Use 'Blank' to leave a tile unconstrained.

aSocketForbids.description: Per-tile placement forbiddances. Each entry refers to entry within loot.json; that loot's conditions must NOT be present on the corresponding footprint tile or placement fails. Array indexed by footprint tile in lockstep with aSocketReqs (length = nCols × nRows; rotates with the item). 'Blank' = no forbiddance.

aSocketAdds.description: Per-tile loot rolled onto each footprint tile once placement succeeds — the conditions/items the placed item contributes to the world. Each entry refers to entry within loot.json. Array indexed by footprint tile (length = nCols × nRows for a non-1×1 footprint; rotates with the item). 'Blank' = nothing applied.
